sections.paragraph:
- Original: καθήκω

- Transliteration: Katheko

- Phonetic: kath-ay'-ko

- Definition:

1. to come down

2. to come to, reach to

a. it is becoming

b. it is fit

- Origin: from G2596 and G2240

- TDNT entry: 10:17,4

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2596 and G2240; to reach to that is (neuter of present active participle figuratively as adjective) becoming: - convenient fit.
